contexts.context: …That’s why this proposal doesn’t allow you to construct <mark>heterogenous</mark> arrays. My gut feeling is that if you…
…gut feeling is that if you were using a <mark>heterogenous</mark> sequence, you were probably doing it by mistake…
…to match the sequence pattern, you can’t match <mark>heterogenous</mark> arrays.
AP: You mentioned that you can’t match <mark>heterogenous</mark> arrays? Can’t you use union types?
JWL: The <mark>heterogenous</mark> problem only applies when you use for-each.
